title: nothoscordum bivalve var. nanum
intro: Nothoscordum bivalve var. nanum, also known as the little white onion or grass onion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and it may also have antiseptic and antifungal properties. Nothoscordum bivalve var. nanum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other infections.
